title: The Esports Club/BGMI Invitational/Season 2
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:The Esports Club - BGMI Invitational Season 2}} {{The Esports Club Navbox}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=The Esports Club - BGMI Invitational Season 2 |icon=TEC BGMI Invitational icon.png |tickername=TEC - BGMI Invitational S2 |shortname=Season 2 |image=TEC-BGMI Invitational Season 2.png |type=Online |team_number=18 |series=BGMI Invitational |organizer= The Esports Club |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/theesportsclub/ |sponsor=[https://www.amd.com/en/ AMD] |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=5,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-09-25|edate=2021-09-26 |facebook=theesportsclub.TEC |web=https://theesports.club |instagram=theesportsclub |youtube=TheEsportsClub |twitter=theesportsclub1 |discord=theesportsclub |previous=The_Esports_Club/BGMI_Invitational/Season_1{{!}}Season 1 |next=The_Esports_Club/BGMI_Invitational/Season_3{{!}}Season 3 }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/theesportsclub/ The Esports Club]''' in association with '''[https://www.amd.com/en/ AMD]''' present the second season of the BGMI invitational tournament ''TEC BGMI Invitational'' called the '''''TEC BGMI Invitational Season 2''''' with a prize pool of ₹5,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi|b1name=Shubham Chawla|b1flag=in |b2=Spero|b2name=Piyush Bathla|b2flag=in |b3= Gamezo Tech|b3name=Subodh Panwar|b3flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''BGMI Invitational Season 2:''' 20th September 2021 to 26th September 2021.'' * '''''Group A Qualifiers:''' 20th September 2021 to 21st September 2021'' ** '' A total of 20 Invited teams will play in Group A ** '' Each team will play a total of 10 matches in a period of 2 days'' ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 6 teams}} from the overall standings will advance to the ''Grand Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|stay|7th to 15th placed}} teams will be relegated to the to the ''Play-Ins''.
* '''''Group B Qualifiers:''' 22nd September 2021 to 23rd September 2021'' ** '' A total of 200 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 2 ** '' A total of 20 Invited teams will play in Group B ** '' Each team will play a total of 10 matches in a period of 2 days'' ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 6 teams}} from the overall standings will advance to the ''Grand Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|stay|7th to 15th placed}} teams will be relegated to the to the ''Play-Ins''.
* '''''Play-Ins:''' 24th September 2021'' ** '' A total of 18 teams (7th to 15th placed from Group A&B) will compete in the Play-Ins'' ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 5 matches in a single day'' ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 6 teams}} advance to ''Grand Finals''.
* '''''Grand Finals:''' 25th September 2021 to 26th September 2021'' ** '' A total of 18 qualified teams (6 from Group A Qualifers + 6 from Group B Qualifers + 6 from Play-Ins) will play in the Grand Finals'' ** '' Teams will get to play a total of 10 matches in a period of 2 days'' ** '' Each day will feature a total of 5 matches'' ====Matchdays==== * ''2 Matchdays: 5 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''25th September''''': ''(E>>M>>E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''26th September''''': ''(M>>E>>M>>E>>M)'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-20}}||0 |} ==Prize Pool== ₹5,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $6790 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
